events.title: Bike Repair @ Oak City Cares
events.description:
Our monthly free community bike repair event! Hosted the second Saturday of each month from 1-3pm at Oak City Cares, a multiservice center for folks experiencing housing insecurity. We fix/replace brakes, clean chains/drivetrains, tune shifters, fix flats, and make other minor adjustments. First come, first served.
 
RCK Volunteer Signup
events.location: Oak City Cares 1430 S. Wilmington Street, Raleigh, NC 27603

events.title: Community Shop Hours
events.description:
Need tools, space, or a hand fixing your bike? Swing by our storage unit turned DIY community bike shop. We’ve got stands, tools, parts, tunes, and support! Bring a bike to work on, or help fix one of ours to give to someone in need.

Access to the shop requires getting through a locked gate. Contact volunteer@raleighcommunitykickstand.org in advance for the code!
events.location: SecurCare Self Storage, 4615 Beryl Rd, Raleigh, NC 27606, USA

events.title: Free Bike Repair @ Peach Road Park
events.description: Free adult bike repairs, safety checks, and tune-ups. First come, first served.
events.location: Peach Road Cultural Center, 911 Ileagnes Rd, Raleigh, NC 27603, USA

events.title: Repair Skill Share & Basic Tune-Ups @ Raleigh RRFM in Eliza Pool Park
events.description: Free basic bike repair skill-share workshop at Eliza Pool Park for the Raleigh Really, Really Free Market (RRFM). We will also be offering free adult bike safety checks and tune-ups. First come, first served.
events.location: Eliza Pool Park, 1600 Fayetteville St, Raleigh, NC 27603, USA
